items.content_html: Wouldn't you like little fren who writes with you? A brother in arms? A companion? A friend? An AI? Well, here you go. This is a plugin for Obsidian that allows you to write with the helpf of NovelAI. It's a very simple plugin, but it's a plugin nonetheless.

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin that compiles a .md document from multiple documents linked using the ![[link_to_document]] syntax. The plugin recursively replaces these links with the content of the referenced documents to an infinite level of nesting.
items.title: filipaldi/text-composer: An Obsidian.md plugin that compiles a .md document from multiple documents linked using the ![[link_to_document]] syntax. The plugin recursively replaces these links with the content of the referenced documents to an infinite level of nesting.
